news.headline: Global gourmet ice cream market expected to reach USD 60.67 billion by 2033, from USD 15.43 billion in 2024, growing at a CAGR of 16.43%.
news.summary: The global gourmet ice cream market was valued at USD 15.43 billion in 2024 and is predicted to reach USD 60.67 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.43% during 2025-2033. Gourmet ice cream is high-end frozen dessert made in small batches with premium ingredients, having denser, creamier consistency and unique flavors like gelato, sorbet, and frozen custard. The market growth is driven by consumer preference for quality over quantity, increasing disposable incomes, and interest in artisanal flavors. Companies like Smoor and Hangyo Ice Creams are capitalizing on this trend by launching luxury ice cream ranges. The industry is also expanding into emerging markets to accelerate growth.

news.headline: Five Below Inc (NASDAQ:FIVE) beats Q4 expectations with $1.391B revenue and $3.48 EPS. Total revenue up 4%, comparable sales down 3%.
news.summary: Five Below Inc (NASDAQ:FIVE) saw an increase in shares trading following the release of their fourth-quarter financial results, which exceeded analyst expectations. The company reported a revenue of $1.391 billion for the fourth quarter, surpassing estimates of $1.386 billion. Additionally, their adjusted earnings were $3.48 per share, beating estimates of $3.38 per share. The company experienced a 4% year-over-year increase in total revenue, while comparable sales dropped by 3% year-over-year. Five Below also expanded by opening 22 new stores in the fourth quarter, bringing their total number of locations to 1,771. At the end of the period, the company had $331.72 million in cash and cash equivalents.

news.headline: FactSet beats Q2 EPS with $4.28, revenue at $570.66 million; client count at 8,645 & ASV at $2.306 billion.
news.summary: FactSet Research Systems Inc. (NYSE:FDS) announced strong second-quarter results, with adjusted earnings per share reaching $4.28, surpassing the expected $4.16. The company recorded quarterly sales of $570.66 million, marking a 4.5% increase from the previous year and slightly exceeding the estimated $570.61 million. Organic revenues for the quarter grew by 4.0% year over year, reaching $568.0 million.As of February 28, 2025, FactSet's client count stood at 8,645, with a net gain of 396 clients in the last three months. This growth was primarily driven by corporate clients, including those acquired from the Irwin deal. The Annual Subscription Value as of the same date was reported at $2.306 billion, up from $2.185 billion a year ago. FactSet noted that organic ASV rose by $19.6 million during the period. For more details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Diana Shipping Inc. has new time charter contract with Cargill for m/v DSI Andromeda at US$14,000/day until Jan 15, 2026.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on March 20, 2025, Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX) disclosed a new time charter agreement for one of its Ultramax dry bulk vessels, the m/v DSI Andromeda, through a subsidiary. The deal is with Cargill Ocean Transportation (Singapore) Pte. Ltd., at a gross charter rate of US$14,000 per day, before a 4.75% commission to third parties. This charter will run from March 29, 2025, until at least November 15, 2025, with the possibility of extending until January 15, 2026. The m/v DSI Andromeda was previously chartered to Bunge SA, Geneva, at a rate of US$13,500 per day, after a 5.00% commission to third parties.

news.headline: VivoPower to spin off Caret Digital with a direct Nasdaq listing and dividend share distribution plan.
Golar LNG secures $1.2 billion finance lease agreements with Chinese leasing companies for FLNG Gimi, closing in Q2 2025.
news.summary: Golar LNG Limited has revealed securing finance lease agreements with a group of top Chinese leasing companies to refinance the current debt facility for FLNG Gimi. The sale leaseback facility is worth around $1.2 billion and is anticipated to be finalized in Q2 2025, pending closure conditions like documentation and approvals from third parties.

news.headline: Soul of Nomad introduces limited edition "Emissary of Speed" luxury golf bag, combining technology and elegance.
news.summary: A luxury membership brand based in Silicon Valley, Soul of Nomad, has recently unveiled its latest innovation - the limited-edition luxury golf bag named “Emissary of Speed.” This exclusive creation, part of the Kennedy Golf Line, is a cutting-edge luxury leather golf bag designed for competitive play while exuding sophistication. The bag is tailored to meet the challenges of intense golfing, showcasing unparalleled elegance and style.

news.headline: CenterWell is providing personalized health care to seniors at Gladstone Walmart in Missouri.
news.summary: CenterWell is set to offer seniors in Gladstone, Missouri with convenient and personalized healthcare services at the local Walmart. The initiative aims to enhance access to medical care for seniors within the area.

news.headline: Firebirds promotes Steve Sturm to COO and Andy Seiple to Executive Chef to drive growth and enhance guest experience.
news.summary: Charlotte, North Carolina - Firebirds Wood Fired Grill has promoted Steve Sturm to Chief Operating Officer (COO) and Andy Seiple to Corporate Executive Chef. This award-winning American restaurant and steakhouse aims to enhance operational efficiency and improve menu offerings under their leadership. The company is focused on growth and providing an outstanding guest experience through these strategic appointments. Steve Sturm's promotion and Andy Seiple's new position highlight the commitment to excellence in their roles within the company.

news.headline: ACE from Tencent demonstrates AI-powered anti-cheat innovations at GDC 2025 in San Francisco.
news.summary: At the Game Developers Conference 2025 in San Francisco, Tencent's game security solution, Anti-Cheat Expert (ACE), demonstrated AI-driven anti-cheat technologies.

news.headline: DataRobot unveils AI suites for finance and supply chain operations with SAP to aid rapid AI implementation.
news.summary: In Boston today, DataRobot unveiled AI application suites for finance and supply chain operations in collaboration with SAP, tailored to seamlessly embed AI into customer setups and operational workflows. These newly introduced AI suites empower AI teams to efficiently deploy AI, safely leverage enterprise data, and expedite the deployment of AI solutions in accordance with the requirements of business users. The DataRobot AI application suites are crafted to optimize the utilization of AI in finance and supply chain management, facilitating a swift and secure integration of AI into existing processes.

news.headline: Exploding Kittens releasing 5 new games for Summer 2025, including first-ever board game.
news.summary: Popular game company, Exploding Kittens, based in Los Angeles, revealed plans to launch five new tabletop games in the summer of 2025. The announcement was made through a press release, with the company teasing the upcoming releases. The new games are expected to expand the company's gaming portfolio and cater to a wider audience. Stay tuned for more updates on these exciting additions to the Exploding Kittens game collection.

news.headline: Medit and Pearl partner to integrate AI into dental tech, enhancing diagnosis accuracy; Medit provides 3D scanners.
news.summary: In a recent joint announcement, Medit, a prominent supplier of dental 3D intraoral scanners and digital dentistry solutions, and Pearl, a global frontrunner in dental AI technology, declared a collaborative effort. The partnership aims to integrate Pearl’s AI-driven diagnostic features into Medit Link's platform. Through this collaboration, dental practitioners will benefit from enhanced intraoral scanning processes by merging Medit's precise imaging technology with Pearl's advanced AI capabilities. This integration will enable dental professionals to make more accurate diagnoses, ultimately improving patient care.

news.headline: Mathis Home partners with Blue Yonder to enhance customer satisfaction through better inventory planning, operated by Professional Services.
news.summary: One of the largest independent furniture retailers in America, Mathis Home, has chosen Blue Yonder to enhance its inventory planning and overall efficiency. This decision comes amid supply chain challenges in the furniture industry such as slow-moving inventory and capacity constraints, which are hard to handle through manual methods. The project, set to be executed by Blue Yonder Professional Services, aims to boost customer satisfaction. Mathis Home, founded in 1960, hopes that this move will help streamline operations and improve performance in response to these industry-wide challenges.

news.headline: ServiceMac wins Fannie Mae 2024 STAR Performer Award in 2 categories, 2nd year in a row, for excellence in mortgage subservicing.
news.summary: ServiceMac, a prominent player in mortgage subservicing and a member of the First American family, has just been honored with Fannie Mae’s 2024 Servicer Total Achievement and Rewards™ (STAR™) Performer award. This commendation was bestowed upon them in two categories, namely General Servicing and Solution Delivery. Notably, this marks the second year in a row that ServiceMac has clinched the STAR award in the General Servicing segment. Fannie Mae’s STAR Program is designed to acknowledge top-tier performance in the mortgage sector.

news.headline: Forescout wins 2025 Cyber Excellence Award for securing healthcare networks and IoMT devices. #Cybersecurity
news.summary: A cybersecurity firm based in San Jose, California has recently been acknowledged for its excellence in securing Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) devices and healthcare networks on a global scale. Forescout received this recognition due to its effective efforts in ensuring the security of these critical systems, highlighting its significant impact in the cybersecurity sector.

news.headline: Vouched wins "Best Identity Verification Solution" award in 2025 FinTech Breakthrough Awards. #AI #IDV #FinTech
news.summary: In Seattle, Vouched, a company specializing in AI-powered identity verification for vital sectors, was named the recipient of the "Best Identity Verification Solution" award in the 9th annual FinTech Breakthrough Awards. This recognition was bestowed by FinTech Breakthrough, an independent market intelligence entity that acknowledges leading firms, technologies, and products in the worldwide FinTech arena. Vouched's AI-powered identity verification technology stood out among competitors, solidifying its position as an industry leader.

news.headline: Saga Origins presents cutting-edge AI-powered gaming innovations at GDC 2025, partnering with major companies to introduce revolutionary features.
news.summary: Saga Origins, the publishing division of Saga Protocol, introduced innovative AI-enhanced gaming experiences during its Sidekick showcase at GDC 2025 in San Francisco. The company showcased partnerships with Super Company, OV Entertainment, Didimo, and Northern Lights Entertainment. These collaborations revealed cutting-edge AI-powered characters, dynamic storytelling, and in-game economies that adapt to player preferences. This initiative aims to revolutionize gaming by incorporating advanced AI technology into the gaming experience.

news.headline: Experian Assistant wins 2025 FinTech Breakthrough Award for Analytics Innovation in California, breaking records.
news.summary: Experian, a prominent global data and technology company based in Costa Mesa, California, has revealed that their Experian Assistant, an AI-powered tool designed to enhance the data-modeling process, has been honored with the 2025 FinTech Breakthrough Award for Analytics Innovation. This marks the second consecutive year that Experian has received this esteemed award, which celebrates organizations committed to revolutionizing the FinTech sector and enhancing individuals' lives through cutting-edge technologies. The Experian Assistant stands out for its ability to significantly expedite the data-modeling lifecycle, making it a standout solution within the industry.

news.headline: Lombardi & Lombardi announces 3 partners named to 2025 NJ Super Lawyers list for personal injury law, Edison, N.J., March 20, 2025.
news.summary: Lombardi & Lombardi, P.A. proudly reveals that Michael F. Lombardi, Esq., Stephen Lombardi, Esq., and Thomas W. Barlow, Esq. have been recognized in the 2025 New Jersey Super Lawyers list for their outstanding performance in personal injury law. The announcement was made in Edison, N.J. on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: Digital Dollar Project publishes whitepaper on modernizing USD, integrating tech for financial system efficiency.
news.summary: The Digital Dollar Project released a new whitepaper in Washington, analyzing the necessity of modernizing the U.S. Dollar digitally. The research emphasizes the importance of preserving the Dollar's dominance, integrating new technologies for enhanced efficiency in the U.S. financial system. The surge in digital asset popularity in recent years has highlighted the evolving landscape of modern currency. This initiative aims to leverage these advancements to fortify the Dollar's position.

news.headline: Survey by J.S. Held shows lenders wary of upcoming policy changes, with decreasing expectations for the U.S. economy.
news.summary: A recent survey titled "Lending Climate in America" conducted by global consulting firm J.S. Held indicates a significant decline in lender expectations for the long-term performance of the U.S. economy. The survey, released from Jericho, N.Y. on March 20, 2025, highlights a sharp decrease in confidence among lenders regarding the future economic outlook. This suggests a notable shift in sentiment among industry professionals.

news.headline: Survey shows cable industry transformation post DOCSIS 4.0 in 2019: increase in tech options and competition.
news.summary: Recent study results from Atlanta reveal significant advancements in technology options and increased competitive pressure following the release of DOCSIS 4.0 in 2019. The study, focusing on the evolution of HFC systems, showcases a rise in innovative solutions and stronger market competition. This indicates a notable shift in the industry landscape, with a growing number of choices available to consumers.

news.headline: Anomali and Consortium strengthen partnership to enhance cybersecurity automation & risk reduction. Acquisition of Metrics That Matter® to boost NGVAR offerings.
news.summary: A cybersecurity platform, Anomali, based in REDWOOD CITY, Calif., revealed its extended partnership with Consortium, a top cybersecurity service provider. The collaboration aims to boost cybersecurity automation, orchestration, and risk minimization for businesses. The move follows Consortium's recent acquisition of Metrics That Matter® (MTM®), a cyber risk quantification startup, adding to its Next Generation VAR (NGVAR) services. This partnership seeks to offer enhanced security solutions to enterprises.

news.headline: Trimarc Security merges with TrustedSec to boost cybersecurity services, with founder Sean Metcalf onboard. Sean joins TrustedSec to combat advanced threats. [CHARACTER COUNT: 138]
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, TrustedSec announced the complete integration of Trimarc Security into its cybersecurity services. This union brings together the expertise of Trimarc in Active Directory and identity security with TrustedSec's existing capabilities. Sean Metcalf, the founder of Trimarc, has also joined TrustedSec, bolstering the team's defenses against advanced threats. The incorporation of Trimarc's specialized knowledge will further enhance TrustedSec's cybersecurity offerings, solidifying their position as a leading provider in the industry.

news.headline: Webinar on maximizing benefits of electronic laboratory notebooks, emphasizing structuring and managing scientific data digitally.
news.summary: Join our upcoming webinar at no cost to discover the comprehensive advantages of transitioning from paper forms to an electronic laboratory notebook. Gain insights from a prominent speaker as they discuss effective strategies for organizing and overseeing scientific data within a digital framework. Enhance your understanding on this topic by attending the session.

news.headline: Auvik introduces new capabilities including SaaS automation, endpoint visibility, and server monitoring for IT teams.
news.summary: A tech company based in Waterloo, Ontario, revealed new features to enhance IT operations. Auvik, known for its IT solutions, introduced advancements in SaaS automation, endpoint network visibility, and server monitoring. These updates offer enhanced control and visibility to IT teams and MSPs. Key additions include SaaS Automation and SaaS License Optimization features in the Auvik SaaS Management solution, along with Endpoint Network Monitoring capabilities. These upgrades aim to provide support to end users in various locations and environments.

news.headline: Free webinar by Xtalks on ICH E6(R3) updates and technology innovation in clinical research for staying competitive.
news.summary: Learn about the recent updates of ICH E6(R3) in a complimentary webinar featuring expert insights. Discover the influence of cutting-edge technology on research sites and tactics to remain competitive in an intricate industry landscape. Participants will be informed about key regulatory changes that are set to affect, ensuring they stay up-to-date on the developments. Join us to explore these topics and equip yourself with the knowledge needed to navigate the evolving landscape.

news.headline: Manifest secures $2.5M in pre-seed funding, pioneers U.S. private equity real estate access via blockchain.
news.summary: In New York, Manifest, a trailblazer in onchain private equity real estate, has disclosed a pre-seed funding round of $2.5 million, jointly led by VanEck Ventures and Lattice Fund. Notable contributors to this funding include Compound and SALT. Emanating from CV and Alliance, prominent crypto accelerators, Manifest aims to transform investor access to the massive $35 trillion U.S. home equity market, enabling swift institutional-grade investments in less than 30 seconds. This initiative signifies a significant shift in how American real estate investments are approached.

news.headline: Webinar by Xtalks on low-volume panel for Alzheimer's research. Learn about high-sensitivity biomarker detection.
news.summary: Join our upcoming webinar to explore a multiplexed biomarker strategy for Alzheimer's and associated dementias. The session will introduce a multiplexed test for detecting biomarkers with high sensitivity in small sample volumes. Experts will discuss the use of plasma proteomics in unveiling valuable insights. Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your knowledge in this field. Mark your calendar for the event where attendees will gain valuable insights into this innovative approach.

news.headline: Valpolicella Consortium joins with VIA for 10th anniversary Italian Wine Ambassador Course in Verona from March 27-31, 2025.
news.summary: The Vinitaly International Academy (VIA) will mark the 10th anniversary of its primary Italian Wine Ambassador course in Verona from March 27-31, 2025. This special edition will see the Consorzio per la Tutela dei Vini Valpolicella join as a sponsor for the first time.

news.headline: Smarsh named 2025 USA TODAY Top Workplace, standing out among 42,000+ orgs, emphasizing innovation & employee excellence.
news.summary: Smarsh, a prominent player in digital communications data and insight, was honored with the esteemed 2025 USA TODAY Top Workplaces prize in Portland, Oregon. Among over 42,000 contenders, Smarsh stood out, highlighting its innovative approach, expansive global presence, and dedication to fostering a culture driven by its employees. The award, designed for organizations with 150 or more staff members, acknowledges Smarsh's commitment to success via its workforce.

news.headline: Powerside acquires Electrotek Concepts to expand power quality solutions, adds PQView software. ALAMEDA, Calif., March 20, 2025. #Powerside #ElectrotekConcepts #PQView.
news.summary: Powerside, a reputable company specializing in advanced power quality solutions, has recently completed the acquisition of Electrotek Concepts from GMC Instruments Group on March 20, 2025. As a result, Powerside now includes PQView®, widely recognized as the industry standard software for power quality monitoring and analysis in the utility sector. This strategic move solidifies Powerside's position in the market and enhances its offerings for clients.

news.headline: Bonanza Cannabis Company now offers premium THC concentrates and edibles in New York, expanding its market reach.
news.summary: A well-established family-owned business known for its exceptional quality has made its debut in the New York market. Bonanza Cannabis Company, a renowned developer of high-quality cannabis products, has recently entered New York, introducing its top-tier THC concentrates and edibles to the market. The move, announced on March 20, 2025, signals the company's expansion efforts and commitment to bringing their premium offerings to a wider audience.

news.headline: Milestone Systems releases XProtect 2025 R1 with enhanced cloud integration and vehicle analytics.
news.summary: A prominent company in the field of open platform video management software, Milestone Systems, has recently unveiled the latest version of their product - XProtect 2025 R1. This new release comes with enhanced capabilities for cloud integration and sophisticated video analytics for vehicle identification. The launch of this version highlights Milestone's dedication to innovation and staying at the forefront of the industry.

news.headline: Military spouses urge Congress to pass Military Family Bill of Rights for protection & support. Initiative to meet lawmakers next week.
news.summary: The Secure Families Initiative (SFI) is urging Congress to pass the Military Family Bill of Rights, which outlines essential safeguards to provide safety, stability, and support to military families. In the upcoming week, Congress will be meeting with military spouses from various locations globally to discuss this important legislation.

news.headline: KUDO launches program in response to changing U.S. language policies, ensuring multilingual communication.
news.summary: In response to changing language access policies in the United States, KUDO has launched a new initiative to help organizations overcome linguistic barriers. The initiative aims to address the challenges posed by recent policy changes and ensure continued effective communication. The initiative was announced in New York on March 20, 2025. This move comes as organizations grapple with navigating a landscape where speaking multiple languages is increasingly important. Through this initiative, KUDO aims to support organizations in fostering inclusivity and accessibility, emphasizing the need to adapt to the evolving language dynamics.

news.headline: New guide "An Executive's Guide to MSPs" provides expert insights for C-suite executives & IT leaders. Published in New York on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: 'Executives' Handbook on MSPs' provides valuable advice and actionable strategies for C-suite professionals and IT heads to enhance their interactions with Managed Service Providers. Recently released in New York on March 20, 2025, this resourceful guide offers insights from experienced specialists like Leart Sapunxhiu and covers crucial aspects of maximizing efficiency when engaging with MSPs.

news.headline: CipherHealth partners with Middlesex Health to save patients $160+ on medications and boost adherence.
news.summary: Middlesex is offering a program in partnership with CipherHealth, a prominent provider of patient-centered communication and insights for top healthcare systems. The initiative aims to help patients save over $160 on their medications and improve medication adherence. The program was unveiled in New York on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: MIT Sloan launches new course "Leading Technical Professionals and Teams" for high-performing teams. March 20, 2025.
news.summary: A new course has been introduced by MIT Sloan Executive Education in Cambridge, Massachusetts on March 20, 2025. The course, titled "Leading Technical Professionals and Teams," aims to equip leaders with the skills needed to establish and maintain high-performing technical teams. This initiative comes as a response to the increasing demand for effective leadership in the technical sector. The program is designed to cater to emerging leaders and offers valuable insights and strategies. This course is expected to benefit a significant number of professionals seeking to enhance their leadership capabilities within technical teams.

news.headline: Researchers question eligibility criteria for SNAP amidst proposed restrictions due to "Make America Healthy Again".
news.summary: Members of the American Agricultural Economics Association (AAEA) have published their latest findings in the Journal of Applied Economics and Agricultural Management (JAAEA) on March 20, 2025. The study analyzes the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) amidst growing calls to limit SNAP purchases to promote better health, aligning with the "Make America Healthy Again" initiative. This research comes at a crucial time when SNAP assistance is under scrutiny, highlighting the need for evidence-based policy decisions. Stay tuned for updates on this important issue.

news.headline: Superior Living Fdn. buys 14 nursing facilities in TX for $250.2M, boosts affordable healthcare, MD-based nonprofit expands.
news.summary: A Maryland nonprofit organization, Superior Living Foundation, Inc., recently finalized the purchase of 14 skilled nursing facilities in eastern Texas for a total of $250.2 million. This acquisition marks their dedication to offering cost-effective healthcare and housing in a rapidly expanding area. The transaction was completed on March 20, 2025, in Bethesda, Maryland.

news.headline: Financial expert David Kenney to manage Project Equity's Employee Ownership Catalyst Fund in Calif. Released on March 20, 2025.
news.summary: David Kenney, an experienced financial advocate and consultant known for his deep impact investments, has been appointed to oversee the Employee Ownership Catalyst Fund for Project Equity. The announcement was made in Oakland, California on March 20, 2025. Project Equity is a prominent national nonprofit organization focused on advancing employee ownership.

news.headline: Mesa Minerals Partners, LLC secures new equity commitment from NGP Royalty Partners III to form Mesa Royalties IV Holdings. Excited about continued focus on acquiring royalty assets in Haynesville and Permian Basin.
news.summary: In Houston, Mesa Minerals Partners, LLC has successfully secured a fresh equity commitment from NGP Royalty Partners III, L.P. to establish Mesa Royalties IV Holdings, LLC. Darin Zanovich, Mesa's President & CEO, expressed enthusiasm about the collaboration with NGP to advance their primary objective of procuring royalty assets in the Haynesville and Permian Basin. During the formation of Mesa III, they developed a top-tier royalty asset in these regions, which they aim to manage and grow further in Mesa IV.

news.headline: Nofar USA and Qcells USA are teaming up to develop two utility-scale energy storage projects in Texas with 350MW capacity and 700MWh total.
news.summary: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida, Nofar USA, a subsidiary of Nofar Energy, and Qcells USA Corp., a subsidiary of Hanwha Qcells, have entered a partnership to collaborate on energy storage projects. The agreement entails the development and construction of projects with a total capacity of 350MW and 700MWh duration (2 hours). These projects, initiated and created by Qcells, are close to obtaining final approvals for interconnection. Additionally, Qcells will provide further assistance in the process.

news.headline: Willdan Group, Inc. secures $17.7M contract to install solar arrays and EV charging stations for Paramount USD, reducing 1,100 tons CO₂ emissions.
news.summary: Willdan Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: WLDN) has secured a contract worth $17.7 million to offer engineering and construction oversight services for Paramount Unified School District (USD). The project entails installing 2.2 MW of solar arrays and setting up 44 level 2 electric vehicle charging stations at 11 locations within the District. The initiative aims to reduce over 1,100 metric tons of CO₂ emissions annually. This significant project is set to benefit the community and contribute to environmental sustainability.

news.headline: Explore outdoor adventures and music in Nashville's Big Back Yard, perfect for a relaxing vacation. Located in LEIPER'S FORK, Tenn.
news.summary: Escape the busyness of everyday life with a unique off-grid vacation experience in Leiper's Fork, Tennessee. Nashville's Big Back Yard offers small-town charm with a mix of outdoor activities and world-class music. Visitors can enjoy immersing themselves in the tranquility of America's beautiful landscapes, away from the hustle and bustle of the city. Experience the perfect blend of adventure and relaxation in this hidden gem. Explore nature, unwind to music, and embrace the essence of true vacation bliss. Explore the wonders of Leiper's Fork for an unforgettable trip.

news.headline: 84% of hospitals using Force Therapeutics meet CMS THA/TKA PRO-PM mandate, avoiding penalties - saving millions.
news.summary: The overwhelming majority of hospitals are leveraging the Force Therapeutics patient engagement platform to meet the CMS THA/TKA PRO-PM requirement, preventing substantial financial penalties. In New York on March 20, 2025, it was reported that this platform has helped a significant number of hospitals comply with the mandate, saving them millions in potential fines. Force Therapeutics is a prominent provider of surgical episode of care management solutions.

news.headline: Coherent launches 2x400G-FR4 Lite silicon photonics-based transceiver for AI data centers and Ethernet networks.
news.summary: The new 400G-FR4 Lite optical transceiver, available in pairs, leverages silicon photonics technology to enhance performance in AI-driven data centers and high-speed Ethernet networks. This cutting-edge module offers twice the capacity at 400G, catering to the increasing demand for faster connectivity in these advanced environments.

news.headline: Kosli secures $10 million from Deutsche Bank and Heavybit, launches new features for financial services.
news.summary: A prominent provider of automated governance solutions for software delivery, Kosli, based in Oslo, Norway, recently secured $10 million in Series A funding. The investment round was spearheaded by Deutsche Bank's Corporate Venture Capital (CVC) group and Heavybit, with participation from Defined Capital, Transpose Platform, and a group of angel investors. Furthermore, Kosli unveiled Kosli Enterprise, introducing enhanced features tailored for financial services companies. These include robust support for extensive user bases, automation for change management, and evidence for auditing purposes.
